# clang trunk: assertion "Invalid CPUStr passed to CpuIs" during multi-version resolver emission for target_clones with unrecognized "arch=slm"

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173685
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:codegen, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-27T06:01:33Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/YejdM4jY1

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

,
"default"
)

(

x

bar

x

return
mysin
(

)

### Comment 2 - shafik

Please fix code formatting

---

### Comment 3 - keinflue

`arch=slm` is not the cause, reduction:

```c
void __attribute__((target_clones("arch=core-avx2","default"))) f(void) {}
```
This occurs with other arch names as well, e.g.
```c
void __attribute__((target_clones("arch=corei7-avx","default"))) f(void) {}
```
```c
void __attribute__((target_clones("arch=core-avx-i","default"))) f(void) {}
```
```c
void __attribute__((target_clones("arch=skx","default"))) f(void) {}
```

The problem seems to be that these are listed in `llvm/lib/TargetParser/X86TargetParser.cpp` with `OnlyForCPUDispatchSpecific == false`, but are not listed in `llvm/include/llvm/TargetParser/X86TargetParser.def`.

Clang checks the validity of the arch name using the former via `isValidCPUName`/`parseArchX86` at https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/blob/c9eb572b141746426560c650fadf9ab75cca9867/clang/lib/Sema/SemaX86.cpp#L1077-L1081, but the latter is used later in codegen at https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/blob/c9eb572b141746426560c650fadf9ab75cca9867/clang/lib/CodeGen/TargetBuiltins/X86.cpp#L686-L701.

The same issue does not occur with `__builtin_cpu_is` because it validates the arch string differently at https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/blob/c9eb572b141746426560c650fadf9ab75cca9867/clang/lib/Basic/Targets/X86.cpp#L1360-L1373.

Maybe the validation for the `target_clones` substring should use an analogous approach? 

---
